plugins.name: claude-notifications-macos

plugins.name: ios-swift-skills
plugins.description: Comprehensive iOS/SwiftUI knowledge base — 12 skills covering SwiftUI, concurrency, security, networking, TDD, performance, design system, CI/CD, App Store, and more
plugins.author: Luis Enrique Lopez

plugins.description: 4 specialized iOS audit agents (architecture, code health, API freshness, UX/accessibility) with a unified /run-audits command
plugins.author: Luis Enrique Lopez

plugins.name: ios-tdd-commands
plugins.description: TDD workflow commands for iOS — red-green-refactor for features, reproduce-first bug fixes, and performance audits
plugins.author: Luis Enrique Lopez

plugins.name: ios-git-hooks
plugins.description: Git safety hooks for iOS projects — blocks commits to main and runs pre-commit quality checks on Swift files
plugins.author: Luis Enrique Lopez
